site.name: 103 Tactical Training
site.tagline: NYC Concealed Carry Classes with LIVE FIRE TRAINING
site.description: 103 Tactical Training provides NYC concealed carry classes, NRA-certified firearm training, private lessons, and application assistance for New York City firearms licenses. NY State DCJS certified instructors.

seo.defaultTitle: 103 Tactical Training | NYC Concealed Carry Classes & Firearm Training
seo.defaultDescription: NYC concealed carry classes with 16 hours classroom + 2 hours live fire. NRA classes, private lessons, and full-service application assistance for NYC firearms licenses.

home.title: 103 Tactical Training
home.description: NYC Concealed Carry Classes with LIVE FIRE TRAINING. 16 hours classroom + 2 hours live fire. CCW Beginner & Renewal packages.

ccwPackages.title: CCW Packages
ccwPackages.description: NYC Concealed Carry Classes. CCW Beginner $600 and CCW Renewal $550. 16 hours classroom, 2 hours live fire, application assistance.

nraClasses.title: NRA Classes
nraClasses.description: NRA Basic Pistol, Basic Rifle, Personal Protection, Instructor courses. Live fire training with certified instructors.

privateLessons.title: Private Lessons / Classes
privateLessons.description: 1-on-1 and private group firearm training. Corporate and security training. Group sponsors of 10+ train FREE.

applicationAssistance.title: Application Assistance
applicationAssistance.description: Full-service NYC firearms license assistance. Rifle/Shotgun permit, pistol permit, concealed carry. NYPD Portal submission, documents, notary.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Contact 103 Tactical Training for NRA classes, private lessons, application assistance, or gift certificates.

book.title: Book Your NYC CCW Class
book.description: Reserve your NYC CCW class online. Select CCW Beginner, CCW Renewal, or NYC CCW. Deposit required.
